info.name: Prompts API
info.description: Postman collection for Prompt Management API endpoints

variable.description: SAM local base URL. Change to your API Gateway URL for deployed env.

item.name: Dropdowns
item.description: Helper endpoints to populate dropdowns in the UI.

request.description: Returns all organizations. Used to populate the Organization dropdown when creating/filtering prompts.
Returns companies belonging to a given organization. Used to populate the Company dropdown after an org is selected.

query.description: Partial match filter on organization name (optional)
Partial match filter on company name (optional)

request.description: Returns all prompts grouped by organization → company. Supports filtering and pagination per company.
Returns a single prompt with its organization_name and company_name via JOIN. Replace '1' with the actual prompt ID.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": 1,
  "company_id": 1,
  "prompt_name": "COBOL to Python",
  "prompt_description": "Converts COBOL source files to Python",
  "input_file_type": "cobol",
  "output_file_type": "python",
  "file_name": "cobol_to_python.txt",
  "prompt_content": "You are an expert developer. Convert the following COBOL code to Python."
}

request.description: Creates a new prompt. If 'file_name' + 'prompt_content' are provided, the content is uploaded to S3 automatically. 'organization_id' and 'company_id' are required.

body.raw:
{
  "prompt_name": "COBOL to Python v2",
  "prompt_description": "Updated conversion prompt",
  "input_file_type": "cobol",
  "output_file_type": "python",
  "file_name": "cobol_to_python_v2.txt",
  "prompt_content": "You are an expert. Convert COBOL to clean, readable Python 3 code."
}

request.description: Updates an existing prompt by ID. Only provided fields are changed (COALESCE). If 'file_name' + 'prompt_content' are given, the old S3 file is deleted and replaced.
Deletes a prompt record and its associated S3 file. Replace '1' with the actual prompt ID.

query.description: Name of the file to upload to S3

request.description: Generates a presigned S3 PUT URL valid for 1 hour. The prompt record is updated with the new file URL immediately. Use the returned 'upload_url' to upload the file directly to S3.

item.name: Upload File to S3 (via presigned URL)

body.raw: You are an expert developer. Convert the following COBOL code to Python 3.

request.description: PUT the raw file content directly to the presigned URL returned by 'Get Presigned Upload URL'. No auth headers needed — the URL is pre-authenticated.
